attributes.action: Connect the Aylesbury-Milton Keynes Link to the East West Rail National Network.
attributes.additional_details: The government has already spent millions on the Aylesbury Vale Parkway project. I have audited the site and the modern signaling (ME 306) and northern junctions are already active and in the ground. Leaving this as a "dead-end" stub is a massive waste of existing taxpayer investment. It is a "shovel-ready" link that is being ignored.
attributes.background: Commission the Department for Transport to integrate the Aylesbury-Calvert spur into the East West Rail (EWR) national network for passenger services.

rejection.details:
We can’t accept petitions that call for action at a local level.

You could ask your MP to take action on your concerns about this issue.

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP
